description_long: This is a rustic wooden easel with a rectangular base and a vertical central support, flanked by two parallel vertical posts. The wood appears aged and weathered, with visible grain and some surface imperfections, giving it a vintage or handmade appearance. The easel features two horizontal crossbars, one of which is equipped with a pivoting arm and notched mechanisms, likely for adjusting the height or angle of the support. Metal hardware is visible at the joints and on the adjustable arm, suggesting reinforced construction and functional adjustability. The base is broad and flat, providing stability, while the overall structure is open, allowing for the placement of a canvas or board. The color is a deep, natural brown, with some areas showing darker or lighter patches due to wear or finish variation.
description: A vintage wooden easel with a rectangular base, central vertical support, and adjustable crossbars with metal hardware. The wood is dark brown and weathered, giving it a rustic appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full face of the easel, including the central support, two vertical posts, crossbars, and the adjustable arm with notched mechanisms.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thin profile of the easel, with the vertical supports and base visible in alignment.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the central support and crossbars, with the adjustable mechanisms partially visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the narrow profile and the alignment of the vertical supports and base.
